explanation: The phrase 'Exceeding sensor limits' maps to the atomic proposition "limits". The phrase 'autopilot pullup' maps to the atomic proposition "pullup". The phrase 'the pilot is not in control' maps to the negation of the atomic proposition "standby". The phrase 'the system is supported without failures' maps to the atomic proposition "supported" and "!apfail". The phrase 'shall latch' maps to the temporal operator "G". The phrase 'when' maps to the logical operator "->". The final formula is G(!standby & supported & !apfail & limits -> pullup).

explanation_dict.natural_language: the pilot is not in control
the system is supported without failures
